# Storage error paths for snapshot / compaction (recoverable RaftExceptions,
# surfaced as "error: ..." by the harness rather than crashing).
# - create-snapshot at an index <= the existing snapshot -> ErrSnapOutOfDate
# - compact at an index <= the already-compacted offset   -> ErrCompacted

add-nodes id=1 voters=1
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1

propose id=1 data=x
----
ok

propose id=1 data=y
----
ok

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=3

create-snapshot id=1 index=3
----
snapshot index=3 term=1

create-snapshot id=1 index=2
----
error: io.github.xinfra.lab.raft.RaftException: requested index is older than the existing snapshot

compact id=1 index=3
----
compacted to index=3

compact id=1 index=2
----
error: io.github.xinfra.lab.raft.RaftException: requested index is unavailable due to compaction
